Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.equality

Class RenamingTermProperty

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.equality.RenamingTermProperty
All Implemented Interfaces:
Property<Term>
public class RenamingTermProperty extends Object implements Property<Term>
A property that can be used in EqualsModProperty.equalsModProperty(Object, Property, Object[]) for terms. Renaming of variables is ignored in this equality check.

The single instance of this property can be accessed through RENAMING_TERM_PROPERTY.

  • Field Summary

    Computes the hash code of term modulo bound renaming.

    • RENAMING_TERM_PROPERTY

      public static final RenamingTermProperty RENAMING_TERM_PROPERTY

  • Method Details

    • equalsModThisProperty

      public <V> boolean equalsModThisProperty(Term term1, Term term2, V... v)
      Checks if term2 is a term syntactically equal to term1 modulo bound renaming.
      Specified by:
      equalsModThisProperty in interface Property<Term>
      Type Parameters:
      V - is not needed for this equality check
      Parameters:
      term1 - a term
      term2 - the term compared to term1
      v - should not be used for this equality check
      Returns:
      true iff term2 has the same values in operator, sort, arity, varsBoundHere and javaBlock as term1 modulo bound renaming

    • hashCodeModThisProperty

      public int hashCodeModThisProperty(Term term)
      Computes the hash code of term modulo bound renaming.
      Specified by:
      hashCodeModThisProperty in interface Property<Term>
      Parameters:
      term - the term to compute the hash code for
      Returns:
      the hash code

    • javaBlocksNotEqualModRenaming

      public static boolean javaBlocksNotEqualModRenaming(JavaBlock jb1, JavaBlock jb2, NameAbstractionTable nat)
      Returns true if the given JavaBlocks are not equal modulo renaming.

      Moved here from JavaBlock while refactoring equalsModRenaming in Term. As the implementation of equalsModRenaming in JavaBlock was only used in handleJava(JavaBlock, JavaBlock, NameAbstractionTable) and the deprecated class de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics.EqualityConstraint, it is now only a helper method in RenamingTermProperty.

      Parameters:
      jb1 - the first JavaBlock
      jb2 - the second JavaBlock
      nat - the NameAbstractionTable used for the comparison
      Returns:
      true if the given JavaBlocks are NOT equal modulo renaming
